heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8285c Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Energy Security Act, and not as part of the National Energy Conservation Policy Act which comprises this chapter.

children.label: a
children.text: To carry out this subchapter there is authorized to be appropriated the sum of $10,000,000 for the fiscal year ending on , and the sum of $15,000,000 for the fiscal year ending on .September 30, 1981September 30, 1982

children.label: b
children.text: Any funds appropriated under the authorization contained in this section shall remain available until expended.
